docs.title: 首页 / Home
docs.text:
Sihan's Blog | 思涵的个人网站 Blog | 文章 云盘 | Cloud Drive GitHub Home / Hub | 首页 / 入口 云盘 / 笔记入口Personal Website Hub

这里集中放置笔记、云盘和项目说明，方便快速直达当前仍保留的公开服务。| A hub for notes, cloud drive, and project notes with only the public services that are still maintained.

notes cloud drive 浏览内容 | Browse 打开云盘 | Open Drive 站点说明 | About

首页只保留当前仍可持续维护的公开入口。AI 服务仍在服务器本地运行，但已从公开导航中移除。| The homepage keeps only the public entrypoints that can be maintained. The AI service still runs locally on the server, but it has been removed from public navigation.

GitHub 源码 | Source Code 内容入口 | Contents

下面是几个常用入口，方便从主页直接跳到云盘、状态说明和源码。| Quick links to the cloud drive, status notes, and source code.

Featured · 精选项目 云盘项目 | Cloud Drive

远程文件存储和共享服务，支持浏览、上传、下载、建目录和删除。| Remote file storage and sharing with browsing, upload, download, folder creation, and deletion.

storage files cloud 快速访问云盘 | Quick Access Status · 状态记录 AI 入口已移除 | AI Entry Removed

AI 服务仍在服务器本地运行，但由于没有稳定固定域名，公开 AI 入口已从首页和文档中移除。| The AI service still runs locally on the server, but the public AI entry has been removed from the homepage and docs because there is no stable fixed domain.

record ai local only no public link 保留原因记录 | Reason Kept Source · 源码库 项目源码 | Repository

完整的项目源代码和部署配置，包括本地 AI 运行、云盘服务和文档。| Full source code and deployment config including local AI runtime, the cloud drive service, and docs.

open source repository deployment 查看源码 | View Code 浏览人数统计 | Visitors 加载中 更新时间 | Updated 2026-04-11

docs.title: 云盘 / Cloud Drive
docs.text:
Sihan's Blog | 思涵的个人网站 Home | 首页 Drive | 云盘 Features | 功能 GitHub Project / Service | 项目 / 服务 云盘服务 | Cloud Drive

浏览、上传、下载和整理文件的轻量云盘入口。| A lightweight browser-based drive for browsing, uploading, downloading, and organizing files.

storage upload download folders 打开云盘 | Open Drive 回到首页 | Back Home 当前能力 | Current Scope

当前版本聚焦基础文件管理：目录浏览、上传、下载、建目录和删除。上传与删除都需要服务端密码。公开 AI 入口已移除，不再从这里跳转。| The current version focuses on core file management: browsing, upload, download, folder creation, and deletion. Upload and delete actions require the server-side password. The public AI entry has been removed and is no longer linked from here.

打开云盘 | Open GitHub 源码 | Code 界面预览 | Interface Preview

下面直接嵌入当前云盘页面；如果 iframe 不稳定，使用上面的按钮直接打开即可。| The current cloud drive page is embedded below. If the iframe is unstable, open it directly with the button above.

上传和删除需要输入密码，普通浏览和下载无需密码。| Upload and delete require a password, while browsing and downloading do not.

功能特性 | Features

这里只展示当前已经在代码里实现的能力。| Only features that are implemented in the current codebase are listed here.

Browse | 浏览 目录浏览 | Directory Browser

支持按目录层级浏览文件，目录优先显示，并实时显示当前磁盘使用情况。| Browse files by folder hierarchy with directories listed first, plus live storage usage information.

tree view storage stats Upload | 上传 文件上传 | File Upload

支持拖拽或选择文件上传，服务端会自动避免重名覆盖。| Upload files by drag-and-drop or file picker, with automatic duplicate filename protection on the server.

password protected safe overwrite avoidance Organize | 整理 目录创建与删除 | Create and Delete

支持创建目录，删除文件或整个目录；删除操作同样需要密码确认。| Create folders and delete files or directories, with password protection for destructive actions.

folders protected delete Download | 下载 直链下载 | Direct Download

文件可直接下载，下载路径会被限制在云盘根目录内。| Files can be downloaded directly, and download paths are constrained to the storage root.

direct link path safety 浏览人数统计 | Visitors 加载中 更新时间 | Updated 2026-04-11
